title: LEGO DUPLO Peppa Pig Funfair - Fine Motor Skills Toys for 2+ Year Old Girls & Boys - Big Fair Wheel, Slide, Juice Bar and 3 Figures incl. Danny Dog & Candy Cat - Early Development Activity - 10453
features: PEPPA PIG TOY FOR TODDLERS – The LEGO DUPLO Peppa Pig Funfair toy for 2+ year old girls and boys lets kids learn through play with characters from the TV show
WHAT'S IN THE BOX? – Includes LEGO DUPLO Danny Dog, Candy Cat and Peppa Pig figures, a rotating big wheel, a slide and juice bar mini build
FUN STORY STARTERS – Toddlers send the characters down the slide, place them in the big wheel gondolas and take them to the juice bar for a refreshing treat
EDUCATIONAL TOY – This early development and activity toy encourages logical thinking, colour sorting and fine motor skills as kids learn to build and act out stories with the fun characters
GIFT FOR TODDLERS – This building set makes a fun birthday gift for 2+ year old girls and boys who love Peppa Pig toys, DUPLO bricks and imaginative play
DIGITAL BUILDING INSTRUCTIONS – The LEGO Builder app features a digital version of the instructions included with this preschool playset
LEARNING THROUGH PLAY – LEGO DUPLO building sets can help preschool kids reach their developmental milestones and learn through play in a fun and engaging way
description: From the manufacturer Join Peppa and friends at the Funfair Feature-filled amusement park toy for preschool kids, with a big wheel, slide toy and juice bar, sparks creative playtimes. Toddlers learn skills through joyful play Toddlers hone fine motor skills while they build this amusement park toy that helps them explore new emotions. LEGO DUPLO Peppa Pig Funfair Active play Little fingers spin the big-wheel toy to start the ride. Understanding emotions Toddlers explore how amusement rides make them feel. Colour-sorting toy Match the characters' outfits to the café stools. Sharing playful moments LEGO DUPLO toys let toddlers and caregivers enjoy precious shared moments as they construct these easy-to-build sets. Gift for toddlers Preschoolers aged 2 and over join beloved characters on fun adventures with LEGO DUPLO Peppa Pig toys (sold separately).
